artPrompt: A tightly packed crowd of ordinary townsfolk presses up the wide frame brandishing pitchforks and rakes yet standing in neat orderly rows, faces set in restrained fury, golden afternoon light raking across the foremost from one warm source. Picket fences and blank lawn placards line the sunlit green behind, fading into soft shadow. Leafy greens and warm ivory dominate, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Angry but Polite Mob
text:
Trample
Angry but Polite Mob's power is equal to the number of Voters you control.
Whenever Angry but Polite Mob attacks, it must attack the player who controls the most permanents if able. (After saying excuse me.)
flavorText: They brought pitchforks AND a thank-you card. They are furious AND they wiped their feet.

extras.frontrunnerPunish: must attack the player with most permanents
